title: QuickSnackLite
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''QuickSnackLites''' were popular [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]] bundles sold by the [[Biscuit Baron]] chain. They were lighter versions of the [[QuickSnack]].

During the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]], Biscuit Baron launched its month-long "[[Heroes of the Republic]]" campaign, which consisted of including commemorative holocubes in QuickSnackLite bundles depicting notable historical figures of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] (including [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellors]] [[Anwis Eddicus]] and [[Vaila Pecivas]], and the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] [[S'diawae]], [[Ikrit]], and [[Jojighar]]).

==Appearances==
